description: Research STR trends and pain points for 2026

keyChallenges: Oversaturated markets - 47.1% of hosts report increased competition affecting business
2026Trends: AI taking on real work: forecasting, anomaly detection, guest/owner engagement
Connected systems where pricing, guest, and operational data interact seamlessly
Short- and mid-term stays converging due to costs/regulation
Revenue managers competing WITH AI, not against it

marketOutlook.competition: Heightened - nearly half of hosts affected
marketOutlook.profitability: Depends on location, market conditions, management quality
marketOutlook.consolidation: Favoring strong niche brands and data-rich operators

nextStep: Research specific pain points: regulations, AI automation, sustainability, guest expectations
